title: Rust autograd attention backward op
description:
Implement `synapse/crates/synapse-autograd/src/ops/attention.rs`: ScaledDotProductAttentionBackward implementing the GradFn trait.

The forward pass calls the FFI fused attention kernel (from task 5) and saves Q, K, V, attention_weights for backward.

Backward computation given grad_output [B,H,Sq,D] and saved tensors:
```
grad_V = attn_weights^T × grad_output
grad_attn = grad_output × V^T
grad_scores = softmax_backward(grad_attn, attn_weights)
grad_scores *= scale
[apply causal mask to grad_scores if causal]
grad_Q = grad_scores × K
grad_K = grad_scores^T × Q
```
Returns: [grad_query, grad_key, grad_value]

Register the new module in the ops mod.rs (add `pub mod attention;`).

Tests (in the same file or in `synapse/crates/synapse-autograd/tests/`):
- grad_check for scaled dot-product attention: numerical vs analytical for Q, K, V gradients
- Shapes: [1,1,4,8], [2,4,16,32]
- Both causal and non-causal modes
- Verify gradient shapes match input shapes

Pass/fail:
- grad_check passes (relative error < 1e-3) for all three gradients (Q, K, V)
- Works for both causal and non-causal attention
- No shape mismatches
